query:
-- Hot projects with no contacts at all
SELECT COUNT(*) as hot_no_contacts
FROM projects p
WHERE p.priority = 'hot'
  AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
  AND p.suppressed = 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM contactProjects cp WHERE cp.projectId = p.id
  );

-- Hot projects where all contacts are llm_inferred (no email path)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) as hot_all_llm_inferred
FROM projects p
JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.priority = 'hot'
  AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
  AND p.suppressed = 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM contacts c2 JOIN contactProjects cp2 ON cp2.contactId = c2.id
    WHERE cp2.projectId = p.id AND c2.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
  )
GROUP BY p.id
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier != 'llm_inferred' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0;

-- Check what llm_inferred contacts look like - do they have emails?
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN email IS NOT NULL AND email != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_email,
  SUM(CASE WHEN email IS NULL OR email = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_email,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM contacts
WHERE contactTrustTier = 'llm_inferred';

SELECT COUNT(*) as hot_no_contacts
FROM projects p
WHERE p.priority = 'hot'
  AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
  AND p.suppressed = 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM contactProjects cp WHERE cp.projectId = p.id
  );

-- Hot projects where all contacts are llm_inferred (no email path)
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) as hot_all_llm_inferred
FROM projects p
JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.priority = 'hot'
  AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
  AND p.suppressed = 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM contacts c2 JOIN contactProjects cp2 ON cp2.contactId = c2.id
    WHERE cp2.projectId = p.id AND c2.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready'
  )
GROUP BY p.id
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier != 'llm_inferred' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0;

-- Check what llm_inferred contacts look like - do they have emails?
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN email IS NOT NULL AND email != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_email,
  SUM(CASE WHEN email IS NULL OR email = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as no_email,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM contacts
WHERE contactTrustTier = 'llm_inferred';
